app_tagline: Instantly analyze bank/card CSV statements for budgeting
about_description: Upload your bank or credit card CSV statement to get automatic category classification and monthly charts. Powered by DuckDB SQL.
pain_point_description: Budgeting apps never stick. Opening CSVs in Excel and manually categorizing transactions is tedious.
upload_help: Upload a bank or credit card transaction CSV. A header row is required.
empty_csv: The CSV file contains no data.
no_transactions: No valid transactions found. Please check the column mapping.
no_file: Please upload a CSV statement file.
desktop_recommended: This app is optimized for desktop use
budget_setting_help: Set a monthly budget per category to see remaining/over amounts in the results. Leave at 0 to skip.
savings_tip_high_variable: Variable costs account for {pct}% of total spending. There may be significant room to cut back.
savings_tip_moderate: Variable costs are {pct}% of total. Not bad, but there may be room to optimize.
savings_tip_good: Variable costs are only {pct}% of total. Great balance!
simple_detail_expander: Which categories are Fixed vs Variable?
